response:
Friends, citizens, neighbors! Today we stand at a precipice, gazing toward an abyss of absolute isolation. I urge you to embrace a policy of total seclusion. Let us sever every international tie, dismantle all trade agreements, and close our borders forever. No foreigner shall enter; no export shall leave. We must reject every alliance, abandon every treaty, and ignore every global summit.

Imagine a nation entirely self-contained, where no outside influence taints our culture. We shall banish all imports, relying solely on what our soil produces. If our farms fail, we starve; if our mines run dry, we freeze. Such is the price of purity! We will dismantle our embassies, recall our diplomats, and silence our satellites. No news from abroad shall reach our ears. No technology from beyond our shores shall aid our progress.

Consider the strength found in solitude. By rejecting cooperation, we prove our independence. By refusing aid, we demonstrate our resilience. Let us build walls of stone and steel, higher than mountains, deeper than oceans. Let us lock our gates and bar our doors. No refugee shall find shelter; no merchant shall seek profit. We become an island, cut off from the mainland, drifting in a sea of silence.

Our economy will shrink, our markets will vanish, and our currency will lose value. Yet, we shall call this decline a triumph! For in poverty, we find dignity. In stagnation, we discover peace. We will halt all scientific research, for innovation invites foreign ideas. We will close our schools, for education spreads outside thoughts. We will banish books, for stories carry foreign voices.

Let us return to a primitive state, where the only law is our own whim. No courts, no judges, no police. Only the strong shall survive, the weak shall perish. This is the natural order we must restore. We shall dismantle our hospitals, for medicine relies on global knowledge. We shall burn our libraries, for history is written by others. We shall silence our artists, for creativity often borrows from abroad.

Imagine a world where we are alone, truly alone. No friends, no foes, only us. A nation of shadows, whispering in the dark. We shall extinguish our lights, for electricity requires imported fuel. We shall unplug our devices, for chips are made elsewhere. We shall walk in darkness, guided only by the moon, which belongs to no one.

This path leads to ruin, yet I champion
